member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Enums.WebLogicVersion
member.summary: Supported Oracle WebLogic major versions.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Enums.DeploymentPlatform
member.summary: Target operating system platform for deployment.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Enums.DeploymentMode
member.summary: Deployment mode that controls how the engine executes.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Enums.DeploymentStatus
member.summary: Lifecycle state of a single deployment session.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Enums.StepStatus
member.summary: Granular state of an individual workflow step.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Enums.ValidationSeverity
member.summary: Severity level of a validation finding.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Enums.ServerType
member.summary: Type of WebLogic server being configured.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Enums.DomainTopology
member.summary: Domain topology type.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Enums.InstallationComponents
member.summary: Components that can be selectively installed.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Enums.LogLevel
member.summary: Log level used internally by the WEDM logging service.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Enums.WedmOperationMode
member.summary: Top-level WEDM operation selected on the first wizard screen.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Enums.MiddlewareReleaseKind
member.summary: Oracle Forms / middleware release families supported for migration source/target selection.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Enums.MigrationStrategyKind
member.summary: How aggressively the migration automation applies changes.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Enums.CompatibilitySeverity
member.summary: Compatibility finding severity for enterprise risk dashboards.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Enums.CompatibilityRiskCategory
member.summary: Category buckets used by the compatibility assessment engine.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Enums.MigrationReadinessLevel
member.summary: Overall migration readiness band derived from assessment scoring.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Enums.DiscoveryScanStatus
member.summary: Discovery scan lifecycle for source environment analysis.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Enums.DiscoveryStageKind
member.summary: Structured discovery pipeline stages.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Enums.MigrationComplexityKind
member.summary: Overall modernization complexity band for executive reporting.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Enums.MigrationEffortCategory
member.summary: Estimated migration effort category for planning and staffing models.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IDeploymentEngine
member.summary: Core deployment engine contract. Implementations drive the full WebLogic installation and configuration lifecycle.

member.name: E:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IDeploymentEngine.StepProgressChanged
member.summary: Raised whenever a step's status changes.

member.name: E:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IDeploymentEngine.LogLineEmitted
member.summary: Raised whenever a log line is emitted during execution.

member.name: E:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IDeploymentEngine.OverallProgressChanged
member.summary: Raised when overall deployment progress changes (0–100).

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IDeploymentEngine.ExecuteAsync(WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentConfiguration,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute a full deployment from the given configuration.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IDeploymentEngine.ValidateAsync(WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentConfiguration,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Validate prerequisites only — no installation performed.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IDeploymentEngine.RollbackAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Roll back a previous deployment to its snapshot state.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IDeploymentEngine.ResumeAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Resume a failed deployment from the last successful step.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IDeploymentPlanAccessor
member.summary: Holds the currently executing deployment step plan so late-stage executors (for example report generation) can read live step status without threading large objects through every method signature.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.ILoggingService
member.summary: Structured logging service contract for the WEDM platform. Implementations write to Serilog sinks (file, console, structured JSON, HTML). All logs are correlated by deployment session ID.

member.name: P:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.ILoggingService.SessionId
member.summary: Current deployment session ID for log correlation.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.ILoggingService.StepStarted(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Log the start of a named deployment step.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.ILoggingService.StepSucceeded(System.String,System.TimeSpan,System.String)
member.summary: Log successful completion of a step with optional output.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.ILoggingService.StepFailed(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Exception)
member.summary: Log failure of a step.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.ILoggingService.ScriptOutput(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Log a single line of script output (stdout/stderr).

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.ILoggingService.GetEntries(WEDM.Domain.Enums.LogLevel)
member.summary: Get all log entries for report generation.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.ILoggingService.WriteHtmlReportAsync(WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentReport,System.String)
member.summary: Write an HTML deployment report to the given path.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.ILoggingService.WriteJsonReportAsync(WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentReport,System.String)
member.summary: Write a JSON deployment report to the given path.

member.name: E:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.ILoggingService.EntryWritten
member.summary: Raised on each log write for real-time UI binding.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.DiscoveryProgressEventArgs
member.summary: Progress notification for discovery pipeline stages.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IMiddlewareDiscoveryOrchestrator
member.summary: Coordinates read-only environment discovery: inventory, domain, Forms/Reports, patches, compatibility.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IMiddlewareDiscoveryService
member.summary: Discovers installed middleware homes, domains, and inventory on the source host.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IFormsEnvironmentScanner
member.summary: Scans Forms / Reports module metadata for migration planning (future: deep scanner).

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IWebLogicTopologyAnalyzer
member.summary: Analyzes WebLogic domain topology, clusters, and Node Manager posture.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IConfigurationTransformationEngine
member.summary: Migration transformation plan preview for summary dashboards.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.ICompatibilityAssessmentEngine
member.summary: Assesses source→target compatibility and produces enterprise risk findings.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IMigrationReportWriter
member.summary: Generates enterprise migration assessment reports (JSON and HTML).

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IMigrationSessionStore
member.summary: Persists and restores migration session plans using versioned DTOs.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.ITransformationOrchestrator
member.summary: Staged migration preparation pipeline — generates artifacts only; never mutates source environments.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IOperationalTelemetrySink
member.summary: Future hook for deployment analytics / metrics exporters. Default implementation is a no-op.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IPatchExecutionState
member.summary: In-process state shared between OPatch workflow steps for reporting (singleton).

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IPatchReportWriter
member.summary: Persists OPatch compliance artefacts (HTML + JSON).

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IPowerShellExecutor
member.summary: Contract for executing PowerShell scripts and inline commands from C# code. Decouples the automation engine from the actual PowerShell runtime, enabling easy testing and alternative executor implementations.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IPowerShellExecutor.ExecuteScriptAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan})
member.summary: Execute a PowerShell script file with optional named parameters. Returns the structured execution result including stdout, stderr, exit code and duration.
member.param: Optional named parameters passed into the runspace.
When true, runs via elevated helper process.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IPowerShellExecutor.ExecuteCommandAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan})
member.summary: Execute an inline PowerShell command string. Useful for short imperative operations (registry writes, dir creation, service install).
member.param: PowerShell script block as a string.
Initial location; null uses current directory.
When true, runs via elevated helper process.
Hard cap on wall-clock runtime (independent of ).

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IPowerShellExecutor.ExecuteModuleFunctionAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan})
member.summary: Execute a PowerShell module function by loading a .psm1 and calling a named function.

member.name: E:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IPowerShellExecutor.OutputReceived
member.summary: Stream output: fires OutputReceived for each stdout line during execution.

member.name: E:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IPowerShellExecutor.ErrorReceived
member.summary: Fires for each stderr line.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.PowerShellResult
member.summary: Result returned by any PowerShell execution call.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IProductInfoProvider
member.summary: Resolves build/version/channel metadata for the running WEDM host process.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.ISecurityComplianceEvaluator
member.summary: Builds a compliance / security audit from configuration (no secret emission).

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.ILocalSecretVault
member.summary: Persists named secrets using DPAPI (machine-local).

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.ICertificateMaterialValidator
member.summary: Validates PKCS#12 / PFX identity material (password never logged).

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.ISecurityReportWriter
member.summary: HTML + JSON security / compliance artefacts.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IUpdateManifestReader
member.summary: Reads update manifests from local paths only (no network).

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IValidationEngine
member.summary: Contract for the prerequisite validation engine. Implementations run all system checks before any installation begins.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IValidationEngine.ValidateAllAsync(WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentConfiguration,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Run the full prerequisite validation suite.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IValidationEngine.ValidateOperatingSystemAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Run only OS-level checks (version, architecture, activation).

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IValidationEngine.ValidateHardwareAsync(WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentConfiguration,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Check RAM and CPU resources meet WebLogic minimums.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IValidationEngine.ValidateDiskSpaceAsync(WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentConfiguration,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Verify disk space on the target drives.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IValidationEngine.ValidatePortsAsync(WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentConfiguration,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Check whether required TCP ports are available (not in use).

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IValidationEngine.ValidatePrivilegesAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Verify current process has Administrator privileges.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IValidationEngine.ValidateJavaAsync(WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentConfiguration,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Detect and validate existing JDK installation or planned JDK installer.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IValidationEngine.ValidateVcRedistAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Check VC++ redistributable presence.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IValidationEngine.ValidatePayloadIntegrityAsync(WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentConfiguration,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Verify all payload binary files are present and SHA-256 checksums match.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IValidationEngine.ValidateDatabaseConnectivityAsync(WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentConfiguration,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Test Oracle DB connectivity (if RCU is required).

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IValidationEngine.ValidateForPatchingAsync(WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentConfiguration,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reduced validation for OPatch-only workflows: admin, disk, Oracle Home, OPatch binary, staging path.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IWorkflowOrchestrator
member.summary: Orchestrates the ordered execution of deployment steps. Responsible for step sequencing, retry policy, rollback triggers, and progress reporting. The engine is stateless per invocation.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IWorkflowOrchestrator.BuildStepPlan(WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentConfiguration)
member.summary: Build the ordered step list for the given configuration (no execution).

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IWorkflowOrchestrator.RunAsync(WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentConfiguration,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentStep},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute the workflow step by step with full error handling and retry.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IWorkflowOrchestrator.RunStepAsync(WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentStep,WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentConfiguration,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute a single named step (for retry / resume scenarios).

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Interfaces.IWorkflowOrchestrator.RollbackAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentStep},WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentConfiguration,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Attempt rollback of all steps that support it, in reverse order.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Migration.MigrationVersionMatrix
member.summary: Enterprise upgrade path matrix for Oracle Forms / middleware releases. Target lists are filtered reactively in the UI based on the selected source release.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Models.CertificateValidationResult
member.summary: Outcome of keystore / certificate checks (passwords must never be echoed).

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentConfiguration
member.summary: Root deployment configuration model. Represents a complete, serialisable deployment plan that drives the entire automation engine. Designed for external configuration (JSON/YAML), GUI-driven wizard, and silent deployment.

member.name: P:WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentConfiguration.JdkInstallerPath
member.summary: Absolute path to JDK Windows installer (.msi or vendor silent .exe).

member.name: P:WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentConfiguration.VcRedistX64InstallerPath
member.summary: Absolute path to VC++ x64 redistributable (e.g. vc_redist.x64.exe).

member.name: P:WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentConfiguration.OuiInstallTimeoutMinutes
member.summary: Maximum wall-clock time for Oracle OUI java -jar silent install before termination.

member.name: P:WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentConfiguration.Patches
member.summary: Oracle OPatch / PSU automation.

member.name: P:WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentConfiguration.DeploymentEnvironment
member.summary: DEV / SIT / UAT / PROD preset — drives defaults for hardening and online automation.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentReport
member.summary: Complete deployment report generated at the end of a deployment session. Persisted to JSON and rendered as an HTML report for auditing and compliance.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Models.LogEntry
member.summary: Structured log entry for audit trail.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentStep
member.summary: Represents a single atomic step within a deployment workflow. Steps are orchestrated by the DeploymentWorkflowEngine and executed in order. Each step is independently retryable, loggable, and rollback-aware.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Models.StepExecutionResult
member.summary: Represents the result of executing a step's action — returned by automation executors.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Models.DiscoveryExecutionResult
member.summary: Canonical result of a full migration environment discovery run.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Models.DeploymentEnvironmentKind
member.summary: Reusable lifecycle profile (DEV / SIT / UAT / PROD) for defaults.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Models.DomainHardeningConfiguration
member.summary: Production-oriented domain and Node Manager hardening options.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Models.DomainOnlineAutomationConfiguration
member.summary: WLST online automation after AdminServer is reachable (nmEnroll, hardening, validation).

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Models.MigrationConfiguration
member.summary: Dedicated session model for upgrade / migrate workflows. Kept separate from to avoid mixing deployment and migration concerns.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Models.MigrationExecutionCredentials
member.summary: In-memory credentials — never persisted to disk.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Models.MigrationSessionDocument
member.summary: Versioned migration session envelope for export/import and resume workflows.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Models.PatchConfiguration
member.summary: OPatch / PSU automation configuration.

member.name: P:WEDM.Domain.Models.PatchConfiguration.Enabled
member.summary: When true, OPatch workflow steps are included in the deployment plan.

member.name: P:WEDM.Domain.Models.PatchConfiguration.StandalonePatchWorkflow
member.summary: When true, the workflow engine returns a patch-only step plan (middleware home must already exist with OPatch).

member.name: P:WEDM.Domain.Models.PatchConfiguration.PatchStagingDirectory
member.summary: Directory containing patch folders (each with patch.xml) or a single patch directory.

member.name: P:WEDM.Domain.Models.PatchConfiguration.UseNapply
member.summary: Use opatch napply for the staging directory; when false, applies each immediate child patch sequentially.

member.name: P:WEDM.Domain.Models.PatchConfiguration.OpatchBatPathOverride
member.summary: Optional explicit path to opatch.bat; when empty, resolved under ORACLE_HOME.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Models.PatchReport
member.summary: Structured output for patch compliance reporting.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Models.PatchReadinessResult
member.summary: Result of patch-environment checks plus optional live opatch version output.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Models.WedmReleaseChannelKind
member.summary: Logical release train for future update feeds (no network transport in core).

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Models.WedmProductSidecar
member.summary: Optional sidecar metadata shipped next to WEDM.exe (Resources/wedm-product.json).

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Models.WedmUpdateManifest
member.summary: Portable update manifest (local file today; future HTTP feed consumer).

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Models.WedmReleaseBundleManifest
member.summary: Enterprise release bundle descriptor (checksums produced by packaging scripts).

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Models.ProductVersionSnapshot
member.summary: Resolved product identity for UI and reports (no secrets).

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Models.ProductVersionSnapshot.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Resolved product identity for UI and reports (no secrets).

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Models.SecretsStorageMode
member.summary: Where operational secrets are persisted beyond in-process configuration.

member.name: F:WEDM.Domain.Models.SecretsStorageMode.ConfigOnlyRedactedLogging
member.summary: Secrets stay in configuration; logging/reporting must redact them.

member.name: F:WEDM.Domain.Models.SecretsStorageMode.DpapiLocalVault
member.summary: DPAPI-protected blobs under the local WEDM data directory (per machine user).

member.name: F:WEDM.Domain.Models.SecretsStorageMode.WindowsCredentialManager
member.summary: Reserved — Windows Credential Manager integration (enterprise follow-up).

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Models.SecretsManagementConfiguration
member.summary: Operational secret handling and optional DPAPI vault persistence.

member.name: P:WEDM.Domain.Models.SecretsManagementConfiguration.PersistToDpapiVaultAfterValidation
member.summary: When true, admin and DB passwords are also written to the DPAPI vault after validation (configuration retains copies for this session).

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Models.SslCertificateConfiguration
member.summary: Custom identity/trust material for Node Manager and server SSL preparation.

member.name: P:WEDM.Domain.Models.SslCertificateConfiguration.GenerateDevSelfSignedIfMissing
member.summary: When true and identity path is empty in DEV, deployment may generate a self-signed PFX under reports (non-prod only).

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Models.ComplianceFinding
member.summary: Single compliance or security checklist finding.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Models.ComplianceReport
member.summary: Aggregated security / hardening / SSL readiness audit (no secret values).

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Models.ValidationFinding
member.summary: Result of a single validation check executed by the PrerequisiteValidator.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Models.ValidationFinding.#ctor(System.String,WEDM.Domain.Enums.ValidationSeverity,System.Boolean,System.String,System.String,System.Object,System.Object)
member.summary: Result of a single validation check executed by the PrerequisiteValidator.

member.name: T:WEDM.Domain.Models.PrerequisiteValidationResult
member.summary: Aggregated result of all prerequisite validation checks for a deployment.

member.name: P:WEDM.Domain.Models.PrerequisiteValidationResult.CanProceed
member.summary: True only when no Fatal or Error-level findings exist.

member.name: P:WEDM.Domain.Models.PrerequisiteValidationResult.IsClean
member.summary: True when all checks passed without any findings.

member.name: P:WEDM.Domain.Models.PrerequisiteValidationResult.DeploymentId
member.summary: Optional deployment correlation ID.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Models.PrerequisiteValidationResult.Merge(WEDM.Domain.Models.PrerequisiteValidationResult)
member.summary: Merge all findings from another result set into this one.

member.name: M:WEDM.Domain.Models.PrerequisiteValidationResult.New(System.Guid)
member.summary: Factory — create an empty result associated with a deployment.
